hero_section.subtitle: A full-stack SaaS boilerplate and starter kit comes with all essential integrations, pages, components, user/admin dashboards, landing page, design source and everything you need to turn your feature-rich SaaS startup idea into reality in a day!

brandshowcase.description: Built by the same team behind numerous successful SaaS and digital products

banner.label: Vestigio Pulse
banner.message: Continuous, evidence-backed answers on what's bleeding revenue right now.

hero_v2.subtitle: Vestigio audits your digital operation automatically and ranks what to fix so you stop leaving money on the table — you skip the analytics and go straight to the decision.
hero_v2.cta_micro: Perfect for ecommerce, SaaS, lead gen, infoproducts, services and apps.

product_tour.title: Not a dashboard. A queue of decisions.
product_tour.subtitle: Every tab is a different lens on the same revenue picture — ranked, evidenced, and ready to act on.
product_tour.section_headline: See exactly what Vestigio delivers for you.

rows.title: Fix checkout redirect chain
rows.desc: 3 redirects add 2.4s latency at payment step

rows.name: Scale Readiness
rows.desc: Critical blockers preventing safe traffic scaling. 5 open issues.

rows.name: Revenue Integrity
rows.desc: Active leaks in checkout, pricing, and onboarding. −$54k/mo at risk.

rows.name: Chargeback Resilience
rows.desc: Dispute readiness and refund policy gaps. 3 open issues.

rows.name: SEO & Discoverability

rows.name: Continuous Compliance
rows.desc: WCAG, GDPR, and regional consent. All current findings closed.

thread.text: Where am I losing the most money right now?
Your biggest revenue leak is the checkout redirect chain. It adds 2.4s of latency and is estimated to cost **−$18k to $42k per month** in lost conversions. I've created a P1 action to address this.
What broke since the last analysis cycle?
3 regressions detected in the last 14 days: checkout abandonment **+12%**, payment validation failed on 2 routes, SSL cert expires in 5 days. The first two are already in the queue at P1 and P3.

maps_panel.subtext: Main conversion path and where visitors drop off.

overlay_ai.message: I scanned 12 surfaces and found 23 findings. The top 3 are critical and account for 64% of the estimated loss.

client_gallery.title: Teams that refuse to scale in the dark
client_gallery.subtitle: From ecommerce to SaaS to lead-gen, Vestigio is the decision engine operators reach for when something is costing them money — and they want to know exactly what.

use_cases.title: Audit, prioritize, recover — every layer of your funnel
use_cases.subtitle: Five product surfaces, one decision engine. From the first scan to continuous regression watch, Vestigio turns scattered signals into a single ranked queue.

items.title: Prioritize the fixes that actually move revenue
items.description: Every finding ranked by impact, urgency and effort. No more spreadsheets — just the next decision, ready to ship.

items.title: Find every leak across your funnel
items.description: Vestigio quantifies losses surface-by-surface — checkout, pricing, onboarding — with confidence ranges, not vibes.

items.title: Every finding traces back to multi-source proof
items.description: Browser-verified, cross-checked, timestamped. Stop arguing about whether a finding is real — see the evidence.

items.title: Catch regressions before your customers do
items.description: Each deploy and campaign creates new vectors. Vestigio re-audits continuously so nothing degrades in silence.

items.title: Ask in plain language, decide with full context
items.description: A workspace for every business question — receita, churn, chargeback. Vestigio Pulse ties answers back to the evidence.

mini_calc_card.tagline: Try Vestigio on your own domain — no signup, no card.

features_section.title: Launch SaaS Startup in Days
features_section.subtitle: Everything you need to build, launch, and scale your SaaS startup.

features.title: Ready-to-Use Integrations
features.description: Database (Postgres with Prisma ORM), Auth (NextAuth), Payments (Stripe), Sanity (Blog), MailChimp (Newsletter), OpenAI, Email, and Many More

features.title: Cutting-edge Technologies
features.description: Built-with cutting-edge technologies to provide a robust foundation for your SaaS product, giving you a competitive edge in the digital market.

features.title: High-quality Design
features.description: Every single component and page is designed with attention to detail on Figma and styled with Tailwind CSS for the Next.js front-end.

features.title: Admin and User Dashboard
features.description: Allows you to easily manage your SaaS operations and enables end-users to easily manage and modify their account settings with ease.

features.title: Fully Customizable
features.description: Vestigio provides the flexibility to customize your audit configuration, analysis scope, and reporting to meet your specific business requirements. Everything is highly customizable and modular.

features.title: Rich Docs and Email Support
features.description: Docs includes detailed, step-by-step guides for every part of Vestigio. If you need further assistance, simply open a support ticket and we will respond promptly.

features_bento.subtitle: Four answers, one decision engine. Find where you're losing money, fix what matters first, verify with evidence, and catch regressions before they cost you.

action_queue.title: A clear queue of what to fix first
action_queue.description: Every finding ranked by impact, urgency, and effort. No more spreadsheets — just the next decision, ready to ship.

revenue_leaks.title: Find where money is bleeding
revenue_leaks.description: Vestigio quantifies every leak across your funnel — with confidence ranges, not vibes. Know what each broken surface is costing you.

continuous_watch.title: Stop the bleed before it compounds
continuous_watch.description: Vestigio tracks every leak from detection to resolution. Watch your monthly losses drop as findings get closed — and catch new regressions the moment they appear.

evidence_orbit.title: Every finding traces back to evidence
evidence_orbit.description: Browser-verified, cross-checked, timestamped. Vestigio enriches every finding with multi-source proof — so your team trusts the call.

revenue_leaks.title: Find Revenue Leaks
revenue_leaks.description: Identify where money is being lost in your conversion funnel.

conversion.title: Improve Conversion

chargeback.title: Reduce Chargeback Risk
chargeback.description: Identify trust gaps and policy issues increasing chargebacks.

landing_vs_app.title: Landing vs App Reality

playbook_prompts.revenue_leak_full_audit: Run a complete revenue leak analysis. Show me every finding that causes revenue loss, ranked by monthly dollar impact from highest to lowest. For the top 5, explain the root cause and what fixing each one would recover. Then show the total combined monthly loss and the estimated recovery if I fix the top 3.
playbook_prompts.conversion_bottleneck: Map my conversion funnel from landing to purchase/signup. At each stage, show which findings create friction. Where is the biggest single drop-off? What's the root cause of that drop-off? If I could only fix one thing to improve conversion, what should it be and how much would it move the needle?
playbook_prompts.trust_signal_audit: Score my site's trust signals across these dimensions: SSL & security badges, reviews & testimonials, company information (about, team, address), contact options (phone, chat, email), policies (returns, privacy, terms), payment trust (logos, guarantees), social proof (customer count, media mentions). For each dimension, rate 1-10 and explain what's missing. What's my overall trust score and what would improve it fastest?
playbook_prompts.executive_summary: Create an executive summary suitable for a board meeting. Include: total monthly revenue at risk (sum of all findings), top 3 critical issues with dollar impact, 90-day priority roadmap (week 1-2: quick wins, month 1: critical fixes, month 2-3: strategic improvements), expected ROI of the full remediation plan, and a single health score from 0-100 for the business.
playbook_prompts.cross_pack_correlation: Analyze findings across ALL packs (revenue integrity, scale readiness, chargeback resilience). Find correlations: Which findings from different packs share the same root cause? Where does fixing a revenue issue also reduce chargeback risk? Where does improving trust also help conversion? Build a correlation map showing connected findings across packs with combined impact.

scale_traffic.text: Can I safely scale paid traffic?

prompts.single_workspace: Discuss the "{title}" workspace. Walk me through what's happening there and what to do about it.
prompts.single_surface: Discuss surface {title}. What findings touch it and what should I prioritise?
prompts.combined: Analyze these together: {parts}. What do they have in common? What's the combined impact and the single highest-leverage fix?

Since you're running a SaaS, Vestigio can analyze your app behind the login wall.
This is optional — you can configure it later in Settings.

root_cause_titles.trust_failure_at_checkout: Buyers lose trust at the checkout moment
root_cause_titles.fragmented_conversion_path: Your purchase flow is split across too many places
root_cause_titles.friction_barrier_on_path: Friction blocking buyers on the path to purchase
root_cause_titles.measurement_blindspot: You can't measure what's happening on your purchase pages
root_cause_titles.policy_deficiency: Required policies are missing or hard to find
root_cause_titles.active_revenue_leakage: Revenue is leaking out of your purchase flow
root_cause_titles.weak_conversion_signal: Visitors can't see how to buy from you
root_cause_titles.support_gap: Customers can't reach support when they need it most
root_cause_titles.expectation_failure: Buyers don't know what they're paying for
root_cause_titles.dispute_defenses_absent: Nothing protects you from chargeback disputes
root_cause_titles.channel_integrity_compromise: Your store is exposed to fraud and tampering
root_cause_titles.commerce_operations_exposed: Your store's admin tools are publicly visible
root_cause_titles.weak_channel_posture: Your site signals weakness to cautious buyers
root_cause_titles.commerce_abuse_exposure: Discount, refund, and pricing logic exposed to abuse
root_cause_titles.untracked_purchase_paths: Hidden purchase paths bypass your main safeguards
root_cause_titles.runtime_commerce_fragility: Your store breaks for real users in real browsers
root_cause_titles.third_party_dependency_risk: Critical buyer experience depends on flaky third parties
root_cause_titles.saas_activation_barrier: Trial users can't reach product value
root_cause_titles.saas_product_experience_gap: Your product fails to demonstrate value to new users
root_cause_titles.saas_expansion_blocked: Users who would pay can't find or evaluate the upgrade
root_cause_titles.brand_inconsistent_in_previews: Your brand looks inconsistent or weak in search and social previews
root_cause_titles.commerce_pages_invisible_to_search: Search engines can't find or understand your product pages
root_cause_titles.brand_impersonation_exposure: Your brand is being impersonated or hijacked
root_cause_titles.behavioral_hesitation_at_commitment: Real buyers hesitate at the moment of purchase
root_cause_titles.behavioral_path_disconnection: Your purchase flow looks fine in code but fails for real users
root_cause_titles.behavioral_value_justification_gap: Buyers see your price but can't see the value
root_cause_titles.behavioral_trust_failure_at_input: Buyers don't trust your forms with sensitive data
root_cause_titles.security_posture_inadequate: Your site looks unsafe to browsers and buyers
root_cause_titles.behavioral_first_session_failure: First-time visitors stall before reaching a revenue milestone
root_cause_titles.behavioral_action_value_misalignment: Low-value actions dominate while high-value actions go unseen
root_cause_titles.paid_acquisition_waste: Paid traffic hits friction that compounds into wasted spend
root_cause_titles.mobile_conversion_failure: Mobile visitors face conversion barriers desktop users never see
root_cause_titles.behavioral_friction_tax: Every funnel step costs more effort than it should
root_cause_titles.behavioral_trust_revenue_gap: Buyers want to convert but lack the trust to follow through
root_cause_titles.behavioral_path_inefficiency: The path to purchase is longer than buyer intent can sustain
root_cause_titles.copy_strategy_gap: Your copy doesn't match what buyers need to hear

root_cause_descriptions.trust_failure_at_checkout: Buyers reach the moment of payment but trust signals around them weaken instead of strengthen. Off-domain handoffs, unrecognized payment providers, and missing security cues at the wrong moment cause buyers to back out — exactly when conversion is closest. The buyer wanted to pay; the experience scared them off.
root_cause_descriptions.fragmented_conversion_path: Your purchase flow is split across multiple domains or requires too many steps. Every transition between surfaces is a fresh chance for the buyer to drop. The path that should feel like one continuous experience feels like a relay race with handoffs at every step.
root_cause_descriptions.friction_barrier_on_path: Technical obstacles on the path from intent to purchase — slow pages, broken or excessively long forms, redundant redirects — directly suppress conversion. Buyers don't push through friction; they bounce. Every step that asks too much is a step that loses revenue.
root_cause_descriptions.measurement_blindspot: The pages that generate revenue aren't being measured. Without analytics on the commerce path, every other improvement is guesswork — you can't optimize what you can't see. Decisions get made on intuition instead of data, and the leaks stay invisible.
root_cause_descriptions.policy_deficiency: Required consumer policies (privacy, terms, returns) are missing, incomplete, or buried where buyers can't find them. This creates legal risk, breaks trust at the purchase moment, and blocks paid traffic acceptance on platforms that require policy presence before serving ads.
root_cause_descriptions.active_revenue_leakage: Revenue is escaping right now through specific broken paths — dead checkout flows, broken forms, missing conversion routes. This isn't a hypothetical risk; it's money leaving today. Every cycle this remains is direct revenue loss with a quantifiable dollar tag.
root_cause_descriptions.weak_conversion_signal: Visitors land on your commercial pages but cannot see how to buy from you. The primary call-to-action is missing, unclear, or competing with louder secondary actions. Even buyers who arrived ready to convert can't find the path — and they leave.
root_cause_descriptions.support_gap: Customers can't reach you when something goes wrong. Hidden contact methods, missing chat, no phone or email near the purchase moment — buyers who can't reach support file disputes instead. Every chargeback is a failed conversation that should have been a support ticket.
root_cause_descriptions.expectation_failure: Buyers complete the purchase without knowing exactly what they bought, when it ships, or how to return it. The mismatch between expectation and reality is the precondition for chargebacks. Confirmation, transparency, and brand continuity at checkout aren't optional — they're the contract that prevents disputes.
root_cause_descriptions.dispute_defenses_absent: The structural defenses that prevent chargebacks — clear policies, reachable support, transparent expectations, brand continuity at payment — are missing in combination. Each defense alone reduces dispute rate; their simultaneous absence compounds risk into elevated chargeback exposure.
root_cause_descriptions.channel_integrity_compromise: Your store is exposed to script tampering, traffic diversion, or weakly governed infrastructure. Third-party scripts running on payment pages, unrecognized form targets, or unprotected endpoints turn your commercial channel into an attack surface. The buyer experience is at the mercy of code you don't fully control.
root_cause_descriptions.commerce_operations_exposed: Admin panels, debug endpoints, configuration files, and operational tools meant for internal use are publicly accessible from your commerce domain. These surfaces enable pricing manipulation, checkout disruption, and data extraction by anyone who finds them. Your internal tools are part of your public attack surface whether you realize it or not.
root_cause_descriptions.weak_channel_posture: Your site's public technical posture signals weakness to cautious buyers and to browsers. Missing security indicators, mixed content warnings, or certificate issues suppress conversion before the offer is even read. The buyer's browser tells them something is wrong — they trust the browser more than they trust you.
root_cause_descriptions.commerce_abuse_exposure: Discount codes, refund flows, cart logic, and pricing endpoints are exposed to automated abuse. Bots and scripts exploit predictable URLs, missing rate limits, or weak governance to drain margins, enumerate coupons, or trigger fraudulent refunds at scale. The abuse compounds silently — by the time you notice the loss, you've already paid for it.
root_cause_descriptions.untracked_purchase_paths: JavaScript-discovered or dynamically-rendered commerce variants operate outside your main trust, measurement, and pricing safeguard model. Revenue flowing through these paths is simultaneously unprotected and invisible to your analytics — you can't measure them, can't trust them, and may not even know they exist.
root_cause_descriptions.runtime_commerce_fragility: Your commerce pages fail or stall when real users open them in real browsers. Slow checkout APIs, overloaded landing pages, sequencing problems where buyers reach the purchase step before critical scripts are ready — the technical reality of the page degrades the conversion that static analysis can't see. The page works for you in dev. It breaks for them in production.
root_cause_descriptions.third_party_dependency_risk: Critical buyer experience — payment, trust badges, support widgets, measurement — depends on external services that fail, load late, or add too much weight. When a third party hiccups, your conversion path breaks with it. Reliability you don't control is reliability you can't promise to your buyer.
root_cause_descriptions.saas_activation_barrier: New trial users can't reach the moment where the product proves its value. High-complexity onboarding, missing next-step guidance, or a disconnect between landing promise and in-app reality kills trial-to-paid conversion before users see what they're paying for. They sign up curious and leave unconvinced.
root_cause_descriptions.saas_product_experience_gap: Once inside the product, users can't discover what it does for them. Empty states without guidance, buried features, and complex navigation prevent the activation moment. The product is capable; the experience hides that capability. Users churn for products that aren't actually better — just better at showing their value.
root_cause_descriptions.saas_expansion_blocked: Users who would happily pay for more cannot find the upgrade path or evaluate it. Hidden pricing, missing upgrade CTAs, or prompts shown without value context cap revenue at the current tier even when willingness-to-pay is higher. Money is leaving on the table because the path to give it to you isn't visible.
root_cause_descriptions.brand_inconsistent_in_previews: Your brand appears inconsistently — or weakly — in search results, social previews, and AI assistant summaries. The first impression of your business is being shaped by missing titles, thin descriptions, and conflicting metadata across surfaces. Recognition and trust erode before buyers ever reach the site.
root_cause_descriptions.commerce_pages_invisible_to_search: Search engines and AI assistants cannot find or properly understand your product and pricing pages. Missing indexing signals, no internal links, and absent structured data make your commercial inventory invisible to organic and AI-driven discovery. Every uncaptured query is direct demand you'll never see.
root_cause_descriptions.brand_impersonation_exposure: Your brand is being actively impersonated. Lookalike domains, typosquats, phishing surfaces, or fragmented brand variants intercept traffic, run fraudulent transactions, or capture mistyped visits. Every intercepted buyer is direct revenue you earned but never saw — and every fraudulent transaction damages the brand trust you spent years building.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_hesitation_at_commitment: Real session data shows buyers reaching the moment of purchase, hesitating, seeking reassurance elsewhere on the site, and abandoning. The gap between intent and confidence is observable in their behavior — and recoverable. They wanted to buy. Something stopped them, and it shows up in the session replay.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_path_disconnection: Your purchase flow looks fine in the code but fails for real users. Funnel steps show traffic but never advance. CTAs are visible but never engaged. Mobile entry points are broken. Critical steps trigger silent retries instead of progression. The path exists structurally and fails behaviorally — and only the pixel sees it.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_value_justification_gap: Buyers see your price but cannot see the value that justifies it. They view the pricing page, backtrack to features, oscillate between surfaces, and abandon. The value proposition is structurally present but behaviorally insufficient to close the gap between price awareness and purchase confidence. They left not because the price was too high, but because nothing told them it was worth it.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_trust_failure_at_input: Forms on conversion-proximate pages ask for sensitive data — payment, identity, contact — without enough trust context around them. The mismatch between what's being asked and what's being promised causes immediate dropoff. The buyer doesn't know enough to feel safe handing over their information, and they back out at the field.
root_cause_descriptions.security_posture_inadequate: Your site's security posture — missing headers, mixed content, open redirects, exposed endpoints — signals unsafety to both browsers and buyers. Modern browsers actively warn visitors, suppressing conversion before the offer is even read. Exposed infrastructure invites exploitation. The technical signals that say 'this site is safe' are absent, and both humans and machines notice.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_first_session_failure: First-time visitors arrive with intent but stall before reaching any revenue milestone. Session data shows new users hitting trust barriers, missing CTAs, or encountering dead-end flows within their first interaction. The first session is the highest-leverage conversion window — when it fails, the buyer rarely returns. Every first-session stall is a permanent loss of the cheapest conversion you'll ever get.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_action_value_misalignment: Visitor behavior concentrates on low-value actions while the high-value actions that drive revenue remain underexposed or buried. Traffic flows to surfaces that don't advance the purchase, and the pages that matter most receive the least engagement. The site is busy but unproductive — activity without advancement. Revenue-generating actions need to be where the attention already is, not where you wish it were.
root_cause_descriptions.paid_acquisition_waste: Paid traffic lands on experiences with elevated friction, trust gaps, or mobile-compounding issues that suppress the conversion you paid to create. The acquisition cost is fixed but the conversion rate is degraded — every friction point on the paid path multiplies your effective cost per acquisition. You're paying full price for half the result, and the waste scales linearly with spend.
root_cause_descriptions.mobile_conversion_failure: Mobile visitors encounter conversion barriers that desktop users never see — broken CTAs, form friction, timing gaps between intent and action. The mobile experience systematically underperforms against the same offer, same traffic quality, same buyer intent. Since mobile is typically the majority of traffic, this gap represents the single largest segment-level revenue loss most sites carry.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_friction_tax: Every step in the funnel costs more effort than it should. Session data shows oscillation between pages, repeated checkout entries, and decision fatigue manifesting as back-and-forth navigation before dropoff. The cumulative friction across the path acts as an invisible tax on conversion — no single step is broken, but the sum of all steps exceeds what buyers are willing to endure.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_trust_revenue_gap: Buyers demonstrate clear purchase intent but abandon at conversion-proximate moments because trust signals are insufficient. Session patterns show elevated reassurance-seeking behavior — policy page visits, support lookups, trust badge scanning — followed by abandonment. The gap between willingness to buy and willingness to trust is measurable and recoverable. These buyers wanted to convert; they needed one more reason to feel safe.
root_cause_descriptions.behavioral_path_inefficiency: The path from first interaction to purchase is longer than buyer intent can sustain. Too many intermediate pages, excessive time between intent signals and conversion opportunities, and intent-absorbing surfaces that capture attention without advancing the purchase all contribute to decay. By the time the buyer reaches the conversion point, the urgency that brought them has dissipated. Shorter paths convert; longer paths leak.

strong_cta_clarity.title: Conversion intent is clear and unambiguous
strong_cta_clarity.description: The primary conversion path is identifiable and free of competing calls-to-action. Visitors can find how to purchase.

trust_continuity_good.title: Trust continuity maintained through checkout
trust_continuity_good.description: The conversion flow stays on-domain with no trust boundary breaks. Users are not redirected to unknown domains during purchase.

policy_coverage_complete.title: Consumer protection policies in place
policy_coverage_complete.description: Privacy, terms, and refund policies are present and accessible. This supports buyer confidence and regulatory compliance.

low_friction_checkout.title: Revenue path free of structural friction
low_friction_checkout.description: No broken forms, excessive redirects, or slow-loading pages detected on the conversion path. The path from intent to purchase is clean.

measurement_covered.title: Measurement infrastructure covers commercial paths
measurement_covered.description: Analytics tools are present at sufficient depth to support attribution, optimization, and conversion measurement.

support_reachable.title: Support channels visible and accessible
support_reachable.description: Contact methods are available and discoverable. Customers can resolve issues through support rather than filing disputes.

smooth_activation.title: Activation flow is clear and low-friction
smooth_activation.description: The onboarding path has clear next steps, progress indicators, and manageable complexity. New users can reach value quickly.

navigation_clean.title: App navigation is clean and navigable
navigation_clean.description: Navigation structure is manageable in depth and breadth. Users can find core features without being overwhelmed.

upgrade_path_visible.title: Upgrade path is visible with clear value context
upgrade_path_visible.description: Upgrade surfaces are present, prominent, and include value propositions. Users can discover and evaluate paid plans.

empty_states_guided.title: Empty states provide clear guidance
empty_states_guided.description: Empty screens include direction, sample data options, or next-step guidance. New users are not left staring at blank interfaces.

parametric_titles.sensitive_input_abandonment: Users abandon after interacting with {field_kind} input
parametric_titles.surface_oscillation_before_dropoff: Back-and-forth between {surfaceA} and {surfaceB} before dropoff due to unresolved decision friction

actions.default_primary: Review findings and address highest severity issues first.
actions.default_verification: Re-run analysis after changes to confirm resolution.

scale_readiness.block_primary: Do not scale traffic until critical issues are resolved.
scale_readiness.block_fix_checkout: Fix checkout integrity: ensure checkout flow stays on-domain or uses a verified provider.
scale_readiness.block_resolve_trust: Resolve trust boundary issues: reduce off-domain handoffs or verify external providers.
scale_readiness.block_add_policies: Add missing policies: privacy, terms, and refund policies are required for commercial sites.
scale_readiness.block_verify_full: Re-run full analysis after fixes to confirm readiness.
scale_readiness.block_verify_checkout: Verify checkout flow manually before scaling.
scale_readiness.fix_primary: Address high-priority issues before increasing traffic significantly.
scale_readiness.fix_improve_policy: Improve policy coverage to reduce compliance risk.
scale_readiness.fix_install_analytics: Install analytics tools to enable proper attribution and optimization.
scale_readiness.fix_strengthen_revenue: Strengthen revenue path: reduce redirects and friction in the conversion flow.
scale_readiness.optimize_primary: Traffic can be scaled. Monitor for regressions.
scale_readiness.optimize_measurement: Consider improving measurement coverage for better optimization.
scale_readiness.optimize_verify: Schedule periodic re-analysis to detect regressions.

revenue_integrity.block_primary: Revenue is actively leaking. Fix the conversion path immediately.
revenue_integrity.block_close_leak: Close revenue leak points: fix broken forms, consolidate checkout to one domain, and ensure clear conversion entry.
revenue_integrity.block_consolidate: Consolidate conversion path: reduce external host fragmentation and eliminate unnecessary redirects before checkout.
revenue_integrity.block_restore_trust: Restore trust at checkout: add policies, verify providers, ensure brand continuity through the purchase flow.
revenue_integrity.block_reduce_friction: Reduce critical path friction: fix broken form actions, speed up slow pages, eliminate unnecessary redirects.
revenue_integrity.block_verify_revenue: Re-run revenue analysis after fixes to confirm leakage is resolved.
revenue_integrity.block_verify_conversion: Monitor conversion rate after changes to measure improvement.
revenue_integrity.fix_primary: Revenue path has structural issues. Address before scaling ad spend.
revenue_integrity.fix_measurement: Improve measurement: install analytics on commercial pages to make revenue leakage visible.
revenue_integrity.fix_clarify_intent: Clarify conversion intent: establish a clear primary CTA and reduce competing actions.
revenue_integrity.fix_streamline: Streamline checkout flow: minimize handoffs and keep the conversion path on-domain where possible.
revenue_integrity.optimize_primary: Revenue path is functional but has optimization opportunities.
revenue_integrity.optimize_measurement: Improve measurement coverage to better quantify revenue impact.
revenue_integrity.optimize_clarify: Clarify primary conversion path for better conversion rates.
revenue_integrity.optimize_verify: Schedule periodic revenue analysis to track improvements.
revenue_integrity.stable_primary: Revenue integrity is stable. No significant leakage detected.
revenue_integrity.stable_verify: Schedule periodic revenue analysis to detect regressions.

chargeback.block_primary: High chargeback exposure. Add refund policy, support channels, and trust signals immediately.
chargeback.block_refund_policy: Add a clear, accessible refund/return policy. This is the single most effective chargeback prevention measure.
chargeback.block_add_support: Add visible support channels (email, phone, or chat). Customers who can reach support resolve issues without disputes.
chargeback.block_clarify_pricing: Clarify pricing and add order confirmation. Expectation misalignment drives "unauthorized charge" disputes.
chargeback.block_verify_policies: Re-run analysis after adding policies and support channels.
chargeback.block_verify_checkout: Review checkout flow for brand continuity and charge clarity.
chargeback.fix_primary: Moderate chargeback risk. Strengthen policies and support before scaling.
chargeback.fix_refund: Improve refund policy clarity and accessibility.
chargeback.fix_support: Add additional support channels for better customer accessibility.
chargeback.fix_confirmation: Add order confirmation and pricing transparency.
chargeback.optimize_primary: Low chargeback risk. Minor improvements available.
chargeback.optimize_support: Consider adding more support channels for redundancy.
chargeback.optimize_communication: Improve post-purchase communication for better customer experience.
chargeback.strong_primary: Chargeback resilience is strong. Continue monitoring.

summaries.unsafe_to_scale_traffic: Scaling traffic is unsafe. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100. Critical issues must be resolved first.
summaries.fix_before_scale: Issues should be fixed before scaling traffic. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100.
summaries.ready_with_risks: Traffic can be scaled with caution. Some risks remain (score: {risk_score}/100) but are not blocking.
summaries.safe_to_scale: Safe to scale traffic. No significant risks detected (score: {risk_score}/100).
summaries.revenue_leakage_detected: Active revenue leakage detected. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100. Conversion path has critical structural issues losing money.
summaries.revenue_at_risk: Revenue path has significant issues. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100. Fix before increasing ad spend.
summaries.revenue_path_fragile: Revenue path is functional but fragile. Risk score: {risk_score}/100. Optimization opportunities exist to reduce leakage.
summaries.revenue_integrity_stable: Revenue integrity is stable. No significant leakage detected (score: {risk_score}/100).
summaries.high_chargeback_risk: High chargeback risk. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100. Missing policies, support gaps, and expectation issues create significant dispute exposure.
summaries.moderate_chargeback_risk: Moderate chargeback risk. Risk score: {risk_score}/100, confidence: {confidence_score}/100. Some protective measures are missing.
summaries.low_chargeback_risk: Low chargeback risk. Risk score: {risk_score}/100. Minor improvements available but not blocking.
summaries.chargeback_resilience_strong: Chargeback resilience is strong. No significant dispute risk detected (score: {risk_score}/100).

confidence_narrative.high_high: Analysis is structurally sound and economic estimates are well-calibrated.
confidence_narrative.high_not_high: Structural analysis is reliable, but economic estimates carry uncertainty. The issues identified are real; the dollar amounts should be treated as directional.
confidence_narrative.not_high_high: Economic data is strong but structural evidence could be stronger. Consider verification to strengthen confidence in the identified issues.
confidence_narrative.low_low: Both structural evidence and economic data carry uncertainty. Findings are directional — verify before taking action on specific dollar estimates.
